name: Sparebanken Øst
longBusinessSummary: Sparebanken Øst operates as a savings bank in Eastern Norway. The company offers savings accounts, retirement savings, guardianship accounts, and deposit accounts; car loans, home and green mortgage loans, environmental loan, cottage loan, mortgages for young people, construction loan, installment loan, commercial property upgrade loan, and framework loans, as well as refinancing services, overdraft, agriculture credit, guarantees, letter of credit, and interest rate swaps. It also provides child, car, boat, camping, pet, electric scooter, frende young, home, cabin, home contents, critical illness, life, motorcycle, travel, valuables, disability, accident, moped, occupational injury, business, and other vehicles insurance products; shares and funds trading, and investment banking services; placement and payment processing services; debit card; BankID; and online and mobile banking services. In addition, the company buys, sells, and stores cryptocurrencies; and operates, leases, and sells real estate properties. The company was founded in 1843 and is headquartered in Drammen, Norway.
